creator: marko.cupac@mimar.rs
text:
(In reply to Muhammad Moinur Rahman from comment #14)

Yes, I build as nobody:

BUILD_AS_NON_ROOT=yes
PORTBUILD_USER=nobody

I have been doing it for years, and never had significant problems with other ports because of that (apart from not being able to use memcached and ccache since 13.0 or so).

Any chance to make it buildable as non-root? If all other rubygms needed for gitlab-ce, as well as gitlab-ce, build as nobody, shouldn't be too hard to make this one as well.
